properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v3 v5 v5 v6 v7 v8 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I found You in the middle of my mess You had been there all along Open arms and open heart, You called me in You didn't hesitate at all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And the lies I once believed They crumble With the weight of Your truth And the fear that gripped my heart Is arrested So that I can see You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I only see in part I will prophesy Your promise I believe You, God 'Cause You finish what You start I will trust You in the process I believe You, God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You set a table in the middle of my war You knew the outcome of it all When what I faced looked like it would never end You said, watch the giants fall

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Fear can go to hell Shame can go there too I know whose I am God, I belong to You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Fear can go to hell Shame can go there too I know whose I am I belong to You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Fear can go to hell Shame can go there too I know whose I am I belong to You I belong

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When I only see in part I will prophesy Your promise I believe You, God 'Cause You finish what You start I will trust You in the process I believe You
